ogTitle: Cumborah vs Cundle Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cumborah and Cundle Flat.
heading: Cumborah vs Cundle Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cumborah, New South Wales and Cundle Flat, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cundle Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Cumborah (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cumborah or Cundle Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cumborah has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Cundle Flat scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cumborah scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Cundle Flat scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cumborah or Cundle Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cundle Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
